context7.description: Library documentation and API reference lookup
context7.usage: Use for fetching up-to-date documentation for libraries like Pulumi, Proxmox, TypeScript, Jest, etc.

consult7.description: Code analysis and consultation across file patterns
consult7.usage: Use for analyzing code patterns, finding specific implementations, or getting insights about codebase structure

vibe-check-mcp-server.usage: Use for validating plans, identifying assumptions, preventing tunnel vision, and learning from mistakes

deepwiki.description: GitHub repository documentation and wiki access
deepwiki.usage: Use for researching GitHub repositories, reading documentation, and getting answers about specific projects

octagon-deep-research.description: Comprehensive research and analysis across topics
octagon-deep-research.usage: Use for comprehensive research on technologies, competitive analysis, market research, and in-depth technical analysis

mcp-mermaid.usage: Use for creating architectural diagrams, flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and other visual documentation

memory-plus.description: Persistent memory management for conversation context
memory-plus.usage: Use for storing project state, retrieving context, tracking decisions, and maintaining conversation continuity

tips.memory-plus: Always record major decisions and progress. Use retrieve before starting new work to get context.
tips.vibe-check: Use before major decisions and when plans become complex. Great for catching assumptions.
tips.context7: Resolve library IDs first, then get documentation. Always check for exact library names.
tips.consult7: Specify regex patterns carefully. Great for finding code patterns across multiple files.
tips.octagon-deep-research: Use for comprehensive analysis when making technology decisions or researching new approaches.
